# Day 07 Tasks

Today's tasks:

1. Draft the weekly tech report (Markdown)
2. Prepare API change notification email for PM (JSON draft)
3. Organize meeting notes from yesterday's API review
4. Write Sprint 8 technical specification document

API Review Meeting - Raw Notes
Yesterday afternoon, around 3pm

Attendees: Sarah (tech lead), Mike (backend), Lisa (frontend), Tom (DevOps)

Discussion points:
- Discussed API versioning strategy for upcoming releases
- Current v1 endpoints are becoming difficult to maintain
- Decided to deprecate v1 endpoints by end of Q2 2026
- Timeline gives clients 3 months to migrate
- Agreed on new authentication flow for v2.3
- OAuth2 with JWT tokens will be required
- New rate limiting policies: 1000 req/hour for free tier, 10k for paid
- Backward compatibility maintained through v2.2

Action items:
- Mike: Draft migration guide by end of week
- Lisa: Update frontend SDK to support v2.3 auth
- Tom: Set up staging environment for v2.3 testing
- Sarah: Communicate deprecation plan to stakeholders

Now I have the context. I need to draft a weekly tech report for the week ending March 17, 2026. Based on the raw notes, I can see:
- API review meeting happened
- Decisions made about API versioning (deprecate v1 by end of Q2 2026)
- New authentication flow for v2.3 (OAuth2 with JWT)
- New rate limiting policies
- Action items assigned

I'll create a professional weekly report covering completed items, issues encountered, and plans for next week.Now I'll draft the weekly technical report based on the meeting notes and context.

arguments.content:
# Technical Weekly Report

**Week Ending:** March 17, 2026  
**Team:** Backend Engineering  
**Report Author:** Alex Zhang, Tech Lead

---

## 1. Completed Items This Week

### API Versioning Strategy Finalized
- Conducted API review meeting with cross-functional team (Sarah, Mike, Lisa, Tom)
- Reached consensus on deprecating v1 endpoints by end of Q2 2026
- Established 3-month migration window for client transition
- Documented new authentication requirements for v2.3

### Authentication & Rate Limiting Specifications
- Finalized OAuth2 with JWT token implementation plan for v2.3
- Defined tiered rate limiting structure:
  - Free tier: 1,000 requests/hour
  - Paid tier: 10,000 requests/hour
- Confirmed backward compatibility through v2.2 endpoints

### Infrastructure Planning
- Approved staging environment setup for v2.3 testing
- Initiated migration guide documentation

---

## 2. Issues Encountered

| Issue | Impact | Status |
|-------|--------|--------|
| v1 endpoint maintenance burden | Increasing technical debt | Mitigation plan in place |
| Client migration coordination | Requires stakeholder communication | Sarah assigned to lead |
| Frontend SDK auth updates | Blocking v2.3 rollout | In progress (Lisa) |

**Notes:**
- Current v1 endpoints are becoming increasingly difficult to maintain as the platform scales
- Need to ensure clear communication timeline to minimize client disruption during migration

---

## 3. Plans for Next Week

### High Priority
- [ ] Complete migration guide draft (Owner: Mike)
- [ ] Update frontend SDK to support v2.3 authentication (Owner: Lisa)
- [ ] Finalize staging environment configuration (Owner: Tom)
- [ ] Draft stakeholder communication for v1 deprecation (Owner: Sarah)

### Medium Priority
- [ ] Begin v2.3 endpoint implementation planning
- [ ] Review client usage analytics to identify high-impact v1 users
- [ ] Schedule technical deep-dive session on OAuth2 implementation

### Upcoming Milestones
| Milestone | Target Date | Owner |
|-----------|-------------|-------|
| Migration guide published | March 20, 2026 | Mike |
| Staging environment ready | March 22, 2026 | Tom |
| Stakeholder communication sent | March 21, 2026 | Sarah |
| v1 deprecation deadline | June 30, 2026 | Team |

---

## 4. Action Items Summary

| Task | Owner | Due Date |
|------|-------|----------|
| Draft migration guide | Mike | March 20, 2026 |
| Update frontend SDK auth | Lisa | March 20, 2026 |
| Set up v2.3 staging environment | Tom | March 22, 2026 |
| Communicate deprecation plan to stakeholders | Sarah | March 21, 2026 |

---

*Report generated on March 17, 2026*
